top_signals.title: Trump & Iran Back in Focus, Korean Stocks Tumble | The Opening Trade 7/8/2026
top_signals.summary:
Stocks fell, bond yields spiked and oil rallied after President Donald Trump thrust geopolitical risks back into focus by declaring the ceasefire between the US and Iran to be over.

The AI rotation trade is gathering pace in Asia as investors pull money from the chipmakers that powered this year’s rally and hunt for cheaper ways to play the technology boom. 

The Opening Trade has everything you need to know as markets open across Europe. With analysis you won't find anywhere else, we break down the biggest stories of the day and speak to top guests who have skin in the game. Hosted by Anna Edwards and Guy Johnson. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: StarkWare CEO suggests 4% annual Bitcoin inflation to replace 21M cap
top_signals.summary: StarkWare CEO Eli Ben-Sasson argued that Bitcoin private keys get lost over time, meaning the amount of usable Bitcoin will diminish. Many disagree.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Caterpillar buys Skycatch to boost AI mine technology
top_signals.summary: The deal adds AI-powered spatial data and digital twin capabilities to Caterpillar's growing mining technology platform.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Inside the world’s biggest battery maker
top_signals.summary: What does CATL’s extraordinary rise mean for the world?

top_signals.title: The Newton’s Cradle of credit today
top_signals.summary: ‘Technicals have not merely supported fundamental pricing this cycle — they have displaced it’

top_signals.title: BNB Chain builds new Layer 1 for agentic trading, targets 2027 mainnet
top_signals.summary: BNB Chain is building a new Layer 1 for agentic trading with sub-50ms preconfirmation and no public mempool, targeting testnet by end-2026.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
